platform.architectures: Buoy 1.1.4 ships Apple Silicon release assets only. Universal and Intel release targets are not part of the current pipeline.

summary: Buoy switches a reversible AC keep-awake profile on and off through a CLI-first engine, repairs persistent macOS sleep blockers when turned off, and exposes a native dashboard for power and system inspection.

mode.meaning: Immediate Buoy ownership of the managed keep-awake profile.
mode.app_behavior: Changing the mode switch immediately runs the corresponding privileged On or Off action.

settings.apply_behavior: Apply Settings updates configuration only while Mode is On.

persistent_policy.off_behavior: Restore safe saved system-sleep values when available, set SleepDisabled to 0, repair supported system-sleep timers set to Never, and verify the resulting sleep-enabled policy.

display_sleep.off_behavior: Restore the saved displaysleep value exactly when a restore point is available; do not classify displaysleep=0 as a system-sleep blocker.

temporary_assertions.presentation: Describe PreventUserIdleSystemSleep as temporary idle deferral, not as Buoy-owned sleep prevention.

features.name: Buoy mode
features.description: Represents Buoy ownership as an immediate On or Off state. On applies the managed keep-awake profile; Off restores safe saved values, repairs persistent sleep blockers, and verifies a sleep-enabled policy.

features.name: Closed-lid awake mode
features.description: Optionally manages SleepDisabled above a battery floor with a helper process.

features.name: Configurable display sleep
features.description: Lets the display sleep on its own timer while full idle sleep on AC stays disabled.

features.name: Native power control surface
features.description: Wraps the CLI in a native macOS app whose mode switch acts immediately; Apply Settings updates configuration only while mode is On.

features.name: Live dashboard
features.description: Shows Overview, Power, System, Processes, Services, Network, and Storage sections.

features.name: Storage summary refresh
features.description: Loads cached or fast summary storage data without forcing a full file enumeration.

features.name: Storage deep scan
features.description: Enumerates large files and deeper targets for exact cleanup review.

features.name: Machine-readable status
features.description: Provides JSON output that reports Buoy ownership, persistent sleep policy, and temporary macOS assertions as separate facts.

permissions.name: Administrator authentication
required_for: app Turn Off or Repair Sleep action

permissions.name: Protected-folder access
permissions.reason: Buoy keeps protected storage scopes opt-in.

permissions.name: Custom folder or drive access
permissions.reason: Buoy stores bookmarks for user-selected extra scan locations.

metrics.name: cpu_overall_percent
metrics.notes: Delta-based CPU usage across all cores.

metrics.name: memory_usage_percent
metrics.notes: Approximate used-memory percentage based on active + wired + compressed memory.

metrics.name: disk_usage_percent
metrics.notes: Root-mount usage using volume metadata when available.

metrics.name: battery_percent
metrics.notes: Unavailable on machines without a battery.

metrics.name: wattage_draw
metrics.notes: Approximate instantaneous power draw when exposed by AppleSmartBattery.

metrics.name: storage_reclaimable_bytes
metrics.notes: Sum of items currently classified as cleanup candidates.

settings.name: mode_enabled
settings.behavior: The app switch applies On or Off immediately; it does not wait for Apply Settings.

settings.name: display_sleep_minutes
settings.behavior: Applied by Apply Settings only while Buoy mode is On.

workflows.name: Turn off Buoy and verify sleep behavior
entry_points: Power -> Turn Off or Repair Sleep

limitations: Current build scripts compile native binaries for the build host instead of universal binaries.
Exact restoration of prior managed values depends on the Buoy state file; without it, Off repairs SleepDisabled and system-sleep Never timers while leaving display sleep independent.
Closed-lid awake mode depends on a helper process that can drift if killed externally.
CPU temperature is intentionally unavailable in the current Apple silicon path.
Protected storage folders remain partial until explicitly granted.
GitHub release downloads are not notarized in the current repository.

first_checks: Confirm the installed CLI is available

troubleshooting.symptom: Mode is Off but the persistent sleep policy needs repair
first_checks: Run buoy status and inspect SleepDisabled and active AC and battery sleep timers
Use Turn Off or Repair Sleep; temporary assertions are informational and do not change Mode Off
Review Access Grants in the Storage section
Check for skipped protected paths in the status text
